evals.prompt: Crea un framework de Playwright para https://www.saucedemo.com/
evals.expected_output: Flow A (E2E). Full framework for SauceDemo: playwright.config.ts with trace on-first-retry, .env.example with BASE_URL/TEST_USER_EMAIL/TEST_USER_PASSWORD, .gitignore, GitHub Actions workflow with artifact upload steps, BasePage.ts, POMs for login/inventory/cart/checkout pages using user-facing locators only (no CSS selectors), spec files with @smoke and @regression tags and web-first assertions, fixtures/index.ts with auth fixture using storageState, global-setup.ts, helpers.ts, test-data.ts. No feature files or step definitions.

assertions.text: playwright.config.ts exists with trace: 'on-first-retry'
.github/workflows/playwright.yml exists (search recursively under project folder) with upload-artifact steps
e2e/pages/BasePage.ts exists with navigate() using waitForLoadState
e2e/fixtures/index.ts exports a custom test and expect
global-setup.ts exists with storageState auth pattern
POMs do NOT contain raw CSS selectors like page.locator('.class')
POMs use user-facing locators: getByRole, getByLabel, getByText, or getByPlaceholder
Spec files use @smoke or @regression tags
Spec files use web-first assertions: await expect(locator).toBeVisible()
.env.example contains BASE_URL, TEST_USER_EMAIL, TEST_USER_PASSWORD
A LoginPage.ts POM exists with methods for entering credentials
No .feature files exist (pure E2E, not BDD)

evals.prompt: Genera un framework de Playwright con BDD y Cucumber para https://www.saucedemo.com/
evals.expected_output: Flow B (BDD). Framework using playwright-bdd: playwright.config.ts with defineBddConfig pointing to features/ and step-definitions/, package.json with playwright-bdd dependency and bdd:generate script, feature files in Gherkin for login/inventory/cart flows with @smoke and @regression tags on scenarios, step definitions using createBdd() with user-facing locators only, POMs in e2e/pages/, support/hooks.ts, support/world.ts, global-setup.ts with storageState, GitHub Actions workflow with bdd:generate step before running tests and artifact upload.

assertions.text: playwright.config.ts exists with defineBddConfig referencing features/ and step-definitions/
package.json includes playwright-bdd dependency
package.json has a bdd:generate script
At least 1 .feature file exists with valid Gherkin scenarios
.feature files use @smoke or @regression tags on scenarios
At least 1 .steps.ts file exists using createBdd()
support/hooks.ts exists
e2e/pages/BasePage.ts exists
Step definitions do NOT use CSS selectors like page.locator('.class')
.github/workflows/playwright.yml exists (search recursively) with bdd:generate step and artifact upload
global-setup.ts exists with storageState for SauceDemo login
